title: calculation.sage.started data
description: Data payload for the calculation.sage.started event, emitted when a Sage calculation job begins execution on a worker.

jobId.description: UUIDv7 job identifier; also the Temporal workflow ID.

tenantKey.description: Tenant identifier of the submitting organization.

calcType.description: Calculator type. Always 'sage' for this event.

calcName.description: Optional human-readable calculation name supplied at submission.
